message:
test(ft-ombfl.11): add boundary tests for l_inf threshold

Adds two tests pinning the exact boundary semantics of the comparator's
l_inf gate:
- pixel_delta_exactly_at_l_inf_threshold_passes: delta == max_l_inf is
  INSIDE the tolerance band (the gate uses `<=`).
- pixel_delta_one_past_l_inf_threshold_fails: delta == max_l_inf + 1
  is the first failing case.

These complement the within/over l_inf tests that already exist with
delta=5 and delta=50 by pinning the exact off-by-one. Verified by
mutation testing: temporarily flipping `<=` to `<` in the pass gate
causes exactly the boundary-passes test to fail (29 passed, 1 failed),
restored cleanly.

Total comparator unit suite: 30 tests across pass/fail axes, SSIM
properties, threshold overrides, dimension-mismatch error path,
diff-PNG marking, perf budget, alpha-channel detection, degenerate
sizes, serde roundtrip, and 4 proptest properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
